overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a red and blue mohawk walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character travels along sidewalks beside multi-lane traffic, passing under massive elevated highways and through commercial districts with holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers.

events.description: character enters the shadow of the elevated highway overpass, reducing natural light

agents.ego_description: character with red and blue mohawk walking steadily along the sidewalk next to traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair walking ahead of ego on the sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial building with large illuminated NC CLEANING signage on the facade
curved multi-level highway structure with orange accent lighting
tall dark skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows
tall industrial pole with horizontal LED light fixture

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open city sidewalk at dusk, passing the NC CLEANING building on the right. Futuristic vehicles move along the multi-lane road to the left, while a massive elevated highway ramp looms ahead. The lighting is a mix of fading natural twilight and artificial street illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway interchange

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as character moves deeper under the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the massive concrete highway structure, navigating between support pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking in the opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the highway deck above
glowing digital advertisement display on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the covered area beneath the elevated highway, where massive concrete pillars dominate the foreground. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with artificial lighting from neon signs and street lamps providing illumination. Other pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon under highway interchange with industrial views

events.description: industrial smoke plume becomes visible rising between distant skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass, approaching the open street ahead where smoke is visible

entered.detail: dark industrial smoke rising into the sky between distant buildings
overhead structure with illuminated traffic signals and directional signs
large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: Deep under the highway interchange, the character continues forward as the environment remains dimly lit by artificial sources. An industrial smoke stack becomes visible in the distance between the towers, and the path is lined with traffic infrastructure and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-end commercial district with luxury storefronts

events.description: emerging from underpass into open commercial area with large illuminated billboards

agents.ego_description: walking past high-end storefronts and large illuminated advertisements in a more open plaza area

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the distant intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying FERVID advertisement with silhouetted figures
modern glass-fronted commercial building with AVANTE signage at street level
street sign indicating speed limit 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a more open commercial district featuring luxury storefronts like AVANTE and large glowing billboards including one for FERVID. The smoke plume remains visible in the distance to the left as the character continues along the wide sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open city sidewalk at dusk into the oppressive shadows of a highway underpass before emerging into a vibrant commercial district. It begins beside the NC CLEANING building, moving past multi-lane traffic as the fading twilight blends with artificial street illumination. As the character advances, the scene shifts into a darker, enclosed environment beneath a massive elevated highway, where concrete pillars dominate the view and neon signs provide the primary light. The camera continues deep under the interchange, passing digital billboards and traffic infrastructure while an industrial smoke stack appears in the distance. Finally, the character emerges from the underpass into a wide, open plaza featuring luxury storefronts like AVANTE and glowing FERVID billboards under the city's artificial glow.
